svg.title: NeTEx Nordic: Timetable chain across frames
svg.desc: Shows DatedServiceJourney through ServiceJourney, JourneyPattern, StopPointInJourneyPattern to ScheduledStopPoint, with TimetabledPassingTime and OperatingDay, organized by frame containment.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om DatedServiceJourney i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om ServiceJourney i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Hva er TimetabledPassingTime i NeTEx Nordic?')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om OperatingDay i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om JourneyPattern i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om Line i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om StopPointInJourneyPattern i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om ScheduledStopPoint i NeTEx Nordic')
